description: Karaite bill of debt paid to Ḥilda bt. Shemuʾel Fayrūz. Dated Thursday 13 Tishrei 5459 AM (1698 CE). Ḥilda receives payment of 300 niṣf fiḍḍa (para/medin) from her husband Yeshūʿa b. Yosef Rofe aka Ṣaʿīr mentioned in her ketubba. There is also mention of a loan for 90 medin between the two spouses. The final lines recount that the debts between them are settled; Ḥilda commits not to claim seek any more payments related to the transaction. Although Ḥilda is receiving money from her ketubba, notably, it is not mentioned within the context of divorce proceedings. MCD.
description_he: שטר חוב קראי לחילדה ב' שמואל פירוז. תאריך: חמישי, י"ג תשרי 5459 = 1698 לספירה. חילדה מקבלת 300 נצף פידה מבעלה ישועה ב' יוסף רופא הידוע כצעיר, המוזכרים בכתובתה. החובות ביניהם מוסדרים.
